title: linum alpinum subsp. julicum
intro: Linum alpinum subsp. julicum, also known as the Alpine flax or mountain flax, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Linaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation due to its high content of linolenic acid and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Linum alpinum subsp. julicum include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing antioxidant properties, which may help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Linum alpinum subsp. julicum include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote healing.
